title: Ashen Custom Mobs x Fresh Animations
description: Ashen Custom Mob models compatible with Fresh__LX's Fresh Animations.
body:
![About](https://i.imgur.com/nMG1TNv.png)

___
Looking to jazz up some of the mobs you'll encounter while you use Ashen 16x _and_ use Fresh__LX's [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) resource pack? This pack adapts Ashen's Custom Mob models to complement the textures included in Ashen 16x and function with Fresh__LX's animations. 

Mobs currently included in the pack:
- Sheep
- Chickens
- Cows
- Mooshrooms
- Pigs
- Husks
- Endermen
- Withers
- Blazes

This add-on **requires** Optifine or another equivalent **AND** Fresh__LX's [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) in order to function!

Place Ashen 16x _above_ Fresh Animations in your load order, and then this pack _above_ Ashen 16x.

___

This pack is designed and intended for use with both [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen) and [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations).

Big shoutout to Fresh__LX for his work on FA and for providing a platform for others to build on that work -- this Add-On wouldn't be possible without the support and resources in the Fresh MC Discord. 
___
